package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_hasprefix_manual_slice_after_len: Manual `len` and slice prefix checks instead of `strings.HasPrefix(...)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario654Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.HasPrefix(haystack, needle)
}
